title: T28-592 Soaked girls ● Strong shelter from raw rain ● Obscenity 7 - Chiharu Miyazawa
description: The 7th popular series! Remaining ● The guerrilla rainstorm that suddenly started to fall on a group of three good friends girls who have been in school for less than half a year. Underwear that is wet and transparent in the rain, a body that is still young and a sweet and sour scent destroys the reason of the gentle uncles at the rain shelter and turns into a devilish leap demon. Severe criminal ● Re, spectaclely strong ● Lesbian ... Even if you cry, everything is drowned out by the sound of rain and no one comes to help ... A never-ending despair hell ...
